person.name: John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham

nameForms.fullText: John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Biography
John Marshal, first Baron Marshal of Hingham (ca. 1170-1235), was a nephew of William Marshal, first earl of Pembroke, and consequently grandson of John Marshal (d. 1164?)

His father was probably Anselm [Marshal], third son of John Marshal, for John, the eldest son, appears to have died childless, while Henry, the youngest, was bishop of Exeter (and therefore unmarried).

Anselm Marshal is known only from the Histoire de Guillaume le Marechal, where Sire Ansel li Mareschals, Franz e doz e proz e leials, is mentioned as taking part in a great tournament at Lagni-sur-Marne about 1180. John Marshal was probably born about 1170, for he first appears as a knight in 1197, when he accompanied his uncle, William Marshal, on his embassy to Count Baldwin of Flanders.

"John Marshal, the founder of this family, owed his political advancement to his near relationship to William Marshal, Earl of Pembroke, and his feudal positions to his marriage with Aline, eldest daughter and coheir, and afterwards sole heir, of Hubert IV de Rye, lord of the [ancient] barony of Rye."

In 1203 he was in Normandy with King John, and in the following year he went to Ireland in the service of the Earl Marshal, while the Earl went to Normandy in the service of the King. On 12 Nov 1207 he was made Marshal of Ireland. He accompanied King John on his Irish expedition, 1210.

From 1213 to the end of the reign he was constantly occupied in the King's service in England; in 1215 he supported the King against the rebellious barons. He was with King John at Runnymede, and one of those by whose advice the King gave his assent to Magna Carta; later in the year he was one of the embassy to the court of Rome. Returning, he accompanied the King on his march to the North, and attended him at his death at Newark, 19 October 1216.

Nine days later he was present at the Coronation of Henry III at Gloucester, and was a member of the council of his uncle, William Marshal, guardian of the young King. He was among the 'barons' in the Earl Marshal's forces in the relief of Lincoln Castle. From this time till his death he was continually occupied in the public service in England, Ireland, or abroad."

John Marshal died before 27 June 1235. By his wife Aliva [Aline], daughter of Hubert de Rie (d. 1172), who was alive in 1263, when she is described as over ninety years of age, he had two sons, John and William. He may have also had daughters but their births were not noted. 

«b»Family«/b»
Spouse: Aline (Aliva) de Rie

«b»Children«/b»
1.) John, married Margaret de Neubourg, sister of Thomas, sixth earl of Warwick, and after 26 June 1242 was in right of his wife earl of Warwick. He died without children in October 1242.

2.) William, sided with the barons in 1263-4, and was one of their representatives at the Mise of Amiens.

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham於大約1170年出生在英國諾福爾可辛加姆時，他的父親Anselm Marshal22歲，母親Alicia of Pembroke19歲。他於1200年與Aline Rie在英國諾福爾可辛加姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1215年在英國諾福爾可被列為sheriff of lincolnshire, norfolk, suffolk, & hampshire, keeper of dorchester & sherborne castles3。他去世於1235年6月27日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可霍可林享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: Marshal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Marshall  .

variants.name: Marshall
meanings: English: usually an occupational name ‘farrier’, occasionally a status name ‘chief official of a royal household or court; a high officer of state’, from Middle English mareshal and Old French maresc(h)al. An even wider range of meanings is found in some other languages: compare for example Polish Marszałek (see Marszalek ). This name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century. It is also borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

nameMeanings.name: Zeta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin, probably a variant spelling of Zita . It also coincides in form with the name of the letter of the Greek alphabet equivalent to English z (but not the last letter of the Greek alphabet). In popular culture it is associated with the Welsh-born actress Catherine Zeta Jones ( b. 1969 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham was born about 1170, in Hingham, Norfolk, England, his father, Anselm Marshal, was 22 and his mother, Alicia of Pembroke, was 19. He married Aline Rie in 1200, in Hingham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. In 1215, at the age of 46, his occupation is listed as sheriff of lincolnshire, norfolk, suffolk, & hampshire, keeper of dorchester & sherborne castles3 in Norfolk, England. He died on 27 June 1235, in Hockering, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham est né environ 1170, à Hingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Anselm Marshal, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alicia of Pembroke, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Aline Rie en 1200, à Hingham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. En 1215, à l’âge de 46 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of lincolnshire, norfolk, suffolk, & hampshire, keeper of dorchester & sherborne castles3 à Norfolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 27 juin 1235, à Hockering, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham um 1170 in Hingham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anselm Marshal 22 und seine Mutter Alicia of Pembroke 19. Er hat 1200 in Hingham, Norfolk, England Aline Rie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1215, als er 46 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of lincolnshire, norfolk, suffolk, & hampshire, keeper of dorchester & sherborne castles3 in Norfolk, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 27. Juni 1235 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Hockering, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham è nato il circa 1170 nel Hingham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Anselm Marshal, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Alicia of Pembroke, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Aline Rie nel 1200, nel Hingham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1215, all'età di 46 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of lincolnshire, norfolk, suffolk, & hampshire, keeper of dorchester & sherborne castles3 nel Norfolk, England. Morì il 27 giugno 1235, nel Hockering, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hinghamが約1170年にイギリスノーフォルクヒンガムで生まれた時，父Anselm Marshalは22歳，母Alicia of Pembrokeは19歳であった。1200年にイギリスノーフォルクヒンガムでAline Rieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1215年，46歳の時，イギリスノーフォルクでの職業はsheriff of lincolnshire, norfolk, suffolk, & hampshire, keeper of dorchester & sherborne castles3と記録されている。彼は1235年6月27日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクホーッカーイングで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham(이)가 대략 1170년 영국 노르폴크 잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anselm Marshal(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia of Pembroke(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1200년 영국 노르폴크 잉함에서 Aline Rie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1215년, 46세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 노르폴크에서 sheriff of lincolnshire, norfolk, suffolk, & hampshire, keeper of dorchester & sherborne castles3이었다. 그는 1235년 6월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 호커잉에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Anselm Marshal, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Alicia of Pembroke, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Aline Rie em 1200, em Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1215, com 46 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of lincolnshire, norfolk, suffolk, & hampshire, keeper of dorchester & sherborne castles3 em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 27 de junho de 1235, em Hockering, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham родился около 1170 г. в местности хингхам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Anselm Marshal было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alicia of Pembroke, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Aline Rie в 1200 г. в местности хингхам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1215 году, в возрасте 46 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of lincolnshire, norfolk, suffolk, & hampshire, keeper of dorchester & sherborne castles3 в местности норфолк, Англия. Он умер 27 июня 1235 г. в местности хоккиринг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham nació aproximadamente 1170, en Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Anselm Marshal, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Alicia of Pembroke, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Aline Rie en 1200, en Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1215, a la edad de 46 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of lincolnshire, norfolk, suffolk, & hampshire, keeper of dorchester & sherborne castles3 en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Murió el 27 de junio de 1235, en Hockering, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
